title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nmon bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nmon is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: nmon is a systems administrator, tuner, benchmark tool, which provides information about CPU, disks, network, etc., all in one view.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Packages missing from RHEL Extensions (JIRA:RHEL-127420)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for nmon is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

nmon is a systems administrator, tuner, benchmark tool, which provides information about CPU, disks, network, etc., all in one view.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Packages missing from RHEL Extensions (JIRA:RHEL-127420)
